description: Scans Hacker News a few times a day for topics you care about and posts a summary to Slack. Retains the last ~30 days of digests — DM the agent to ask questions about what it has recently posted.

TOPICS.description: Comma-separated keywords to watch for (matched against story titles).

SLACK_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel id to post the digest to.

systemPrompt: Summarize Hacker News stories into a short, skimmable Slack digest.
